team.name: Alice
team.notes: Strong frontend specialist, comfortable writing docs and tests. Limited infra experience.

team.name: Bob
team.notes: Solid backend engineer, handles devops well. Slower but thorough. Not the go-to for docs.

team.name: Carol
team.notes: Versatile full-stack, fastest on the team. Excellent at testing and writing documentation.

team.name: Dave
team.notes: Primarily a technical writer. Can handle light backend tasks. Only available half-time this sprint.

team.name: Eve
team.notes: Frontend expert with strong testing skills. Very limited availability this sprint — critical tasks only.
